_comment: Starter architecture-fitness ruleset for the lib/toolkit quick-start family (grm-quick-start-template, #314). Encodes the 'api-seam stays engine/host-free' convention (the obsidian-api pattern): the public API surface (src/lib.*, src/api/**, src/seam/**) may depend on internal engine code, but nothing outside the seam reaches into internal/_private modules directly. Adapt the layer globs and the 'no-host-in-api-seam' pattern to the project's real engine/host module names. To decline enforcement entirely, replace this file's contents with { "schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..." } — grm-architecture-audit surfaces that decision explicitly instead of silently passing. Design: docs/grimoire/design/architecture-fitness-design.md §Scaffold defaults.

required-file-content.message: Cargo.toml should set [profile.dev] debug = "line-tables-only" — shrinks target/debug while keeping backtrace-quality debug info (#447)
